{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Jade-level constructs
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jade-level constructs]] push beams aside and lift boulders for [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
